article_title: Create and Manage Pay Item Groups

shots.label: Pay Item Group list — Active tab
shots.notes: Shows the Active tab table with Pay Item Group Name, Description, Pay Items Included, Applicable Staff, Actions columns and the Create Pay Item Group button.

shots.label: Create Pay Item Group — form
shots.notes: Shows the Pay Item Group Name, Description, Automatically Tagged fields and the Select Pay Items table.

shots.label: Confirm Compensation Updates modal
shots.trigger_note: Triggered by saving an edit to a pay item group that is assigned to existing compensations. Capture requires demo org with at least one group assigned to a compensation.
shots.notes: Shows 'Update Compensations' and 'Future Assignment Only' buttons.
